import re, unicodedata, math, difflib

# Arabic normalization
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')

def normalize_ar(text):
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        return ""
    # Remove diacritics
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub('', text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('ـ', '')
    # Normalize hamza forms
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    text = text.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # Normalize ta marbuta and alif maqsurah
    text = text.replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # Remove punctuation and symbols
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)  # keep Arabic letters and digits?
    # Remove Arabic and Latin digits?
    text = re.sub(r'[\d٠-٩]', ' ', text)
    # Collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute LCS length dynamic programming
    m, n = len(a), len(b)
    # optimization: if either is empty
    if m == 0 or n == 0:
        return 0
    dp = [0]*(n+1)
    for i in range(1, m+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, n+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[n]

def lcs_ratio(a, b):
    # ratio relative to longer string length
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    L = lcs_length(a, b)
    return L / max(len(a), len(b))

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = set(a.split())
    tb = set(b.split())
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    prec = len(ta & tb)/len(ta)
    rec = len(ta & tb)/len(tb)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

def score_similarity(source_text, candidate_text):
    # compute normalized string and token F1 and LCS ratio; return average or best
    na = normalize_ar(source_text)
    nb = normalize_ar(candidate_text)
    # We'll compute LCS based on char-level normalized
    lcsr = lcs_ratio(na, nb)
    f1 = token_f1(na, nb)
    # also compute difflib ratio on normalized
    ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, na, nb).ratio()
    # Combine: Some weighting
    score = max(lcsr, f1, ratio)
    return score, {'na': na, 'nb': nb, 'lcsr': lcsr, 'f1': f1, 'ratio': ratio}
